headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (disclosure compliance costs only) — Adani Green Energy's record 5 GW renewable addition signals sector growth but limited direct impact for Adani Power
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, TCFD disclosure obligations; no penalties or deadlines breached.
No direct P/E compression or margin erosion; sectoral green shift may support long-term multiples.
No immediate cost of capital impact; potential for minor bond spread tightening if green alignment is demonstrated.
